---
title: "Certificates"
subtitle: "Academic and Professional Certifications"
page-layout: full
css: styles.css
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
---

## BSc. Industrial Chemistry Certificate
**Awarded on 20th August 2021**

<iframe src="ian_zablon.cert.pdf" width="100%" height="600px">
</iframe>

---

## GRAPH Courses RBB Certificate
**Global Research on Public Health and Analysis**

<iframe src="13091_Ian_Zablon_GRAPH_Courses_RBB_Certificate.pdf" width="100%" height="600px">
</iframe>
